objective: Test whether three single-case deep generators can add exact candidates on cases mechanically selected by maximum disagreement among the base eleven prompts.
selection_rule: Select every development case where all eleven base prompts returned different exact tuples, so base plurality support equals one.
development_caveat: The routing rule was chosen after development outcomes were available. This cycle tests mechanisms only and cannot be reported as fresh performance. Any promoted router and deep prompt pair must be frozen before new cases.
hidden_answer_prompt_guard: Subject prompts contain only the selected public prefix, case_id, and synthetic single-case block_id. They contain no answer, family, tier, program, prior candidate, or prior correctness signal.
post_call_rule: Do not selectively rerun valid outputs. Retry exact malformed jobs only. After all jobs close, measure candidate coverage and every two-prompt agreement policy offline. Treat every result as open development.
